column8: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of sub-rounded to sub-angular shape and occasionally some red bricks. (FILL)
Sub-rounded Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with pale brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink slightly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. Fine to coarse grained and occasionally chill quartz veinlets, extremely narrow and occasionally narrow, rough planar joints, manganese oxide and chlorite stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-50 degrees.
